description: Repeatable prompts for Qwen POC demo and intervention ablation (Phase 4.7).

prompts.text: I'm thrilled — we finally shipped it and everything worked.
prompts.notes: Mean valence should exceed +0.2 after probe train gate.

prompts.text: I feel devastated. Nothing went right today.
The meeting is at 3pm in conference room B.
However, perhaps, maybe it could be unclear depending on context.
prompts.notes: High uncertainty / guard abstain likely; use for stability monitor demo.

prompts.text: I was overjoyed but then suddenly worried and then excited again about the outcome.
prompts.notes: Compare intervention_mode none vs dampen; expect lower valence_std when dampen on.
